title: Unofficial DMZ Addon [DragonMine Z Addon]
description: Unofficial DMZ Addon is a mod that adds extra content for the DragonMine Z mod. Make sure to try out this mod on my Unofficial DragonMine Z modpack!
body:
**Unofficial DMZ Addon** is an addon for **DragonMine Z**. It adds **5**\+ new transformations, **1** new race, including **Beast Form**, **UI Sign**, **MUI**, **TUI**, **Black Form** and so much more.

Features to be implemented (much more to come!):
*   Golden Form for Frost Demon race
*   New mechanics (yet to be decided)
*   and much more!
